title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/engine.py (第 539 至 630 行，共 775 行) ---
 539 |     def save_session(self):
 540 |         """利用 context 模块的序列化能力进行保存，同时保存 plan 状态和三层记忆"""
 541 |         # 🔥🔥🔥 核心修复：保存前强制同步所有相关摘要的状态
 542 |         if self.plan_manager.is_plan_complete() and self.plan_manager.current_goal:
 543 |             current_goal = self.plan_manager.current_goal
 544 | 
 545 |             # 1. 更新情景记忆中的相关摘要
 546 |             if self.context._enable_memory_layers:
 547 |                 episodic_summaries = self.context.memory_manager.episodic_memory.get_all()
 548 |                 updated_count = 0
 549 |                 for summary in episodic_summaries:
 550 |                     # 匹配规则：goal 完全一致，或包含关系
 551 |                     if summary.task_goal == current_goal or \
 552 |                        current_goal in summary.task_goal or \
 553 |                        summary.task_goal in current_goal:
 554 |                         if summary.task_status != "completed":
 555 |                             summary.task_status = "completed"
 556 |                             updated_count += 1
 557 |                             print(f"   [状态同步] 情景记忆摘要 {summary.session_id} → completed")
 558 | 
 559 |                 if updated_count > 0:
 560 |                     print(f"   [✅] 已更新 {updated_count} 条情景记忆摘要的状态")
 561 | 
 562 |             # 2. 更新 session_summaries 中的相关摘要
 563 |             updated_count2 = 0
 564 |             for summary in self.context.session_summaries:
 565 |                 if summary.task_goal == current_goal or \
 566 |                    current_goal in summary.task_goal or \
 567 |                    summary.task_goal in current_goal:
 568 |                     if summary.task_status != "completed":
 569 |                         summary.task_status = "completed"
 570 |                         updated_count2 += 1
 571 |                         print(f"   [状态同步] 会话摘要 {summary.session_id} → completed")
 572 | 
 573 |             if updated_count2 > 0:
 574 |                 print(f"   [✅] 已更新 {updated_count2} 条会话摘要的状态")
 575 | 
 576 |         data = {
 577 |             "history_summary": self.context.history_summary,
 578 |             "messages": self.context.get_serializable_messages(),
 579 |             "plan": self.plan_manager.to_dict(),  # 🔥 保存计划状态
 580 |             # 🔥 新增：保存三层记忆数据（Phase 2/3）
 581 |             "memories": self.context.export_memories()
 582 |         }
 583 |         with open(self.session_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 584 |             json.dump(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 585 |         # print(f" [💾] 会话已存档: {self.session_id}")
 586 | 
 587 |     def load_session(self):
 588 |         """恢复记忆和计划状态，以及三层记忆数据"""
 589 |         if os.path.exists(self.session_path):
 590 |             try:
 591 |                 with open(self.session_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 592 |                     data = json.load(f)
 593 |                     self.context.history_summary = data.get("history_summary", "")
 594 |                     self.context.messages = data.get("messages", [])
 595 |                     # 🔥 新增：恢复计划状态
 596 |                     if "plan" in data:
 597 |                         self.plan_manager.from_dict(data["plan"])
 598 | 
 599 |                         # 🔥🔥🔥 问题 4 修复：验证 Plan 状态一致性
 600 |                         is_valid, issues = self.plan_manager.validate_state()
 601 |                         if not is_valid:
 602 |                             print(f"\n[⚠️] 检测到 Plan 状态不一致:")
 603 |                             for issue in issues:
 604 |                                 print(f"   - {issue}")
 605 |                             # 自动修复
 606 |                             self.plan_manager.auto_fix()
 607 | 
 608 |                         # 🔥🔥🔥 核心修复：自动清理已完成的 Plan
 609 |                         if self.plan_manager.is_plan_complete() and self.plan_manager.current_goal:
 610 |                             print("[✅] 检测到上一个 Plan 已全部完成，自动清理...")
 611 |                ...
